scene_ranger_arrival.title: The Ranger's Arrival
scene_ranger_arrival.clean_text: Dust and sand rasped on Noor's tongue, the heat from Zahra's wake still buzzing under her skin. She registered a change in the ranger: a composed, deliberate certainty where there had been only urgency.

scene_mountain_road.title: The Mountain Road
scene_mountain_road.clean_text: The vehicle tore up the mountain road, tires skidding as the ranger fought the incline. The headlights swung across bare rock, and for a moment the dark beyond them seemed to lean closer.

scene_content_filtered_fallback.title: The Reckoning
scene_content_filtered_fallback.clean_text: The confrontation unfolded near the old well, where the family had once drawn water. The night gave no answer, only the long road back down the mountain.
